description_long: This office building features a modern, geometric design with a predominantly octagonal footprint and multiple vertical sections. The facade is characterized by alternating bands of dark-tinted glass and light-colored structural framing, creating a striking contrast and a sense of depth. The windows are arranged in a regular, stacked pattern, with each floor clearly delineated by horizontal bands. The roof is flat with several mechanical structures and antennae visible, suggesting a functional, high-rise commercial use. The base of the building is slightly wider, providing stability and a subtle transition to the surrounding urban environment. The main entrance is recessed and framed by prominent vertical elements, enhancing the building's contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, multi-story office building with a geometric facade of dark glass and light structural bands, featuring a flat roof and a recessed main entrance.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, vertical window bands, and the prominent geometric framing on the facade.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the regular, stacked window pattern and the octagonal shape of the building's footprint.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the mechanical structures on the roof and the consistent window arrangement across all floors.
description_view_3: This view reveals the building's rear, with fewer entrance features and a focus on the structural framing and window repetition.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, horizontal bands of rectangular windows stacked vertically on each facade segment.
